coredata.dc:title: Community pharmacy counseling in multilingual care

ce:section.ce:para: The English abstract for this Elsevier XML fixture summarizes the intervention, the patient counseling workflow, and the multilingual communication setting.
El resumen en espanol debe conservarse como una segunda seccion de abstract y no como una seccion de resultados o discusion.
The body section records how counseling consistency changed after multilingual patient materials were introduced across the study clinics.
A second results paragraph keeps the fixture safely above abstract-only thresholds and confirms that the XML body remains separate from the bilingual abstract container.
